Fields.Description: Type of marker (FE) to display at target position

If a value other than 0 is set, the wire action (action possible/recognition) distance will be extended by that distance. It is assumed that it will be used on a limited basis as it will be searched regardless of the grid.
With the reference direction of the wire edge as the front, only characters within this angle above can perform wire actions.
With the reference direction of the wire edge as the front, only characters within this angle below can perform wire actions.
Only characters within this angle on the left side can perform wire actions when the reference direction of the wire edge is the front.
Only characters within this angle on the right side can perform wire actions when the reference direction of the wire edge is the front.
Offset the character physical homing parameter ID with this value. Use this when you want to shift the homing target position for each wire edge.
